FRONTIER-BROKEN_FORGE_RELIC.title: Broken Forge
FRONTIER-BROKEN_FORGE_RELIC.description: At combat start, the forge mechanism activates. You draw fewer cards, and each turn you manually upgrade 1 card in your hand.
FRONTIER-GREAT_FORGE_RELIC.title: Great Forge
FRONTIER-GREAT_FORGE_RELIC.description: At combat start, add 1 [gold]Great Forge[/gold] to your draw pile.
FRONTIER-HEATPROOF_APRON_RELIC.title: Heatproof Leather Apron
FRONTIER-HEATPROOF_APRON_RELIC.descripti: Whenever you gain Heat, gain 2 Block.
FRONTIER-SMELTER_SHARD_RELIC.title: Smelter Shard
FRONTIER-SMELTER_SHARD_RELIC.description: At combat start, add 1 [gold]Smelter[/gold] to your draw pile.
FRONTIER-HEART_OF_FLAME_RELIC.title: Heart of Flame
FRONTIER-HEART_OF_FLAME_RELIC.descriptio: Burn/Body Burn mitigation effect is planned in a future update.
FRONTIER-BLAST_FURNACE_SHARD_RELIC.title: Blast Furnace Shard
FRONTIER-BLAST_FURNACE_SHARD_RELIC.descr: At combat start, add 1 [gold]Blast Furnace[/gold] to your draw pile.
FRONTIER-GRINDING_ROOM_SHARD_RELIC.title: Grinding Room Shard
FRONTIER-GRINDING_ROOM_SHARD_RELIC.descr: At combat start, add 1 [gold]Grinding Room[/gold] to your draw pile.
FRONTIER-HEPHAESTUS_BLOOD_RELIC.title: Blood of Hephaestus
FRONTIER-ANCIENT_ANVIL_RELIC.title: Ancient Anvil
FRONTIER-ANCIENT_ANVIL_RELIC.description: Whenever you play an upgraded card, gain 3 Block.
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_HAMMER_RELIC.title: Fusioner Hammer
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_HAMMER_RELIC.descripti: Enchant-on-obtain effect is planned in a future update.
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_TONGS_RELIC.title: Fusioner Tongs
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_TONGS_RELIC.descriptio: Whenever you play an upgraded card, gain 1 Strength.
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_ANVIL_RELIC.title: Fusioner Anvil
FRONTIER-FUSIONER_ANVIL_RELIC.descriptio: Whenever you play an upgraded card, gain 5 Block.
